PricingPage.metaTitle: Services & Pricing — Web, Automation & AI Marketing | AION

PricingPage.webDesc: Professional websites that turn visitors into clients.
PricingPage.autoDesc: AI WhatsApp, CRM, and automatic prospect follow-up.
PricingPage.mktDesc: Multi-channel campaigns optimized with artificial intelligence.
PricingPage.note: No long-term contracts. All services include support and training.
PricingPage.faq1A: Yes. Many clients combine website + automations. We offer special bundle pricing.
PricingPage.faq2A: No. The price includes everything described in each package. Marketing does not include ad spend.
PricingPage.faq3Q: Can I start with one service and add more later?
PricingPage.faq3A: Yes. Start with what you need today and scale whenever you want. No penalties.
PricingPage.faq4Q: Which package is right for me?
PricingPage.faq4A: It depends on your goals. On the strategy call, we'll recommend the ideal combination for your business.
PricingPage.faq5A: There are no long-term contracts. We work month-to-month for recurring services like marketing and support. Websites and automations are one-time delivery projects.
PricingPage.faq6Q: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee?
PricingPage.faq6A: Yes. We work with you until you're satisfied with the result. We include revision rounds in every project to make sure it turns out exactly as you need.

DentalPage.metaTitle: Websites for Dental Clinics — Design & Automation | AION
DentalPage.metaDesc: Professional websites for dentists that generate new patients. Online scheduling, WhatsApp follow-up, and local SEO.
DentalPage.title: More patients, less effort
DentalPage.subtitle: Your dental clinic needs a website that works for you: attracting patients, booking appointments, and following up automatically.
DentalPage.feat1Desc: Patients pick date and time from your site 24/7. You get confirmed appointments. Less front-desk work, more patients seen.
DentalPage.feat2Desc: Automatic WhatsApp reminds, confirms attendance, and follows up post-visit. Reduces cancellations and re-engages inactive patients.
DentalPage.feat3Desc: We rank your clinic first for 'dentist near me' searches. Organic traffic = free patients, every single month.
DentalPage.feat4Desc: Before/after gallery of your best cases. Visitors see real results and book with confidence.
DentalPage.faq1Q: How much does a dental clinic website cost?
DentalPage.faq1A: Our plans start at $499 USD for a professional site with contact form and basic SEO. The Growth plan includes scheduling and WhatsApp.
DentalPage.faq2Q: Does it include online appointment booking?
DentalPage.faq2A: Yes. Growth and Enterprise plans include an integrated scheduling system with automatic WhatsApp reminders.
DentalPage.faq3Q: How does lead follow-up help me?
DentalPage.faq3A: Every person who visits your site and leaves their info receives automatic follow-up. This significantly increases the rate of patients who actually show up.
DentalPage.faq4Q: Can I showcase my clinic's services and specialties?
DentalPage.faq4A: Yes. Your site will have dedicated sections for each service: orthodontics, implants, cosmetic dentistry, cleanings, etc. With clear descriptions that help patients decide.
DentalPage.faq5Q: Does the site work well on mobile phones?
DentalPage.faq5A: Yes. All our sites are 100% responsive and look perfect on phones, tablets, and computers. Most patients search for a dentist from their phone.
DentalPage.faq6Q: How long does it take to build my dental website?
DentalPage.faq6A: A Starter site is delivered in 1 week. Sites with scheduling and automations take 2-3 weeks. We give you a clear timeline from day one.
DentalPage.ctaDesc: We reply in under 2 minutes. No strings attached.

RealEstatePage.metaTitle: Websites for Real Estate — Design & Automation | AION
RealEstatePage.metaDesc: Real estate websites that capture buyers and provide automated follow-up. Property catalog, CRM, and integrated WhatsApp.
RealEstatePage.title: Sell more properties with less effort
RealEstatePage.subtitle: A website that showcases your catalog, captures interested prospects, and follows up automatically until they're ready to buy.
RealEstatePage.feat1Desc: Your catalog with photos, floor plans, and smart filters. Buyers search, filter, and fall in love with the property without you lifting a finger.
RealEstatePage.feat2Desc: Smart forms that capture and classify prospects. You only get buyers with real interest and a defined budget.
RealEstatePage.feat3Desc: Dashboard showing every buyer, which properties they like, and what stage they're at. Close more deals with clear information.
RealEstatePage.feat4Desc: Automatic WhatsApp and email nurture prospects with similar properties until they're ready to buy. You just close.
RealEstatePage.faq1Q: Can I upload my properties myself?
RealEstatePage.faq1A: Yes. We deliver a simple admin panel where you can add, edit, and remove properties without technical knowledge.
RealEstatePage.faq2Q: Does it include real estate portal integration?
RealEstatePage.faq2A: In the Enterprise plan we can integrate your site with portals like Zillow, Realtor.com, and others for your market.
RealEstatePage.faq3A: Each registered prospect automatically receives info about similar properties, reminders, and WhatsApp follow-up until they complete their purchase.
RealEstatePage.faq4Q: Can buyers filter properties by area, price, or type?
RealEstatePage.faq4A: Yes. Your catalog includes advanced filters by location, price range, property type, number of bedrooms, and more. Buyers find what they're looking for in seconds.
RealEstatePage.faq5Q: Does the site rank on Google for real estate searches?
RealEstatePage.faq5A: Yes. We optimize every page with local SEO so you show up for searches like 'homes for sale in [your city]' or 'new apartments [your area]'.
RealEstatePage.faq6Q: Can I showcase virtual tours or property videos?
RealEstatePage.faq6A: Yes. We support photo galleries, videos, 360° virtual tours, and even Matterport integration for immersive walkthroughs.
RealEstatePage.ctaDesc: We reply in under 2 minutes. No strings attached.

RestaurantsPage.metaTitle: Websites for Restaurants — Digital Menu & Reservations | AION
RestaurantsPage.metaDesc: Restaurant websites with digital menu, online reservation system, and automated marketing. Fill your tables every day.
RestaurantsPage.title: Full tables, zero manual effort
RestaurantsPage.subtitle: Your restaurant needs more than a PDF menu. It needs a website that attracts diners, takes reservations, and builds loyalty.
RestaurantsPage.feat1Title: A menu that sells for you
RestaurantsPage.feat1Desc: Mouthwatering photos, compelling descriptions, and clear prices. Update in seconds. Customers order more when they see more.
RestaurantsPage.feat2Title: Full tables without answering the phone
RestaurantsPage.feat2Desc: Customers book from your site or WhatsApp in 30 seconds. Auto-confirmation. Fewer no-shows, more tables filled.
RestaurantsPage.feat3Title: Customers who come back on their own
RestaurantsPage.feat3Desc: Automatic WhatsApp promos to customers who haven't returned. Birthday coupons, seasonal offers. Loyalty on autopilot.
RestaurantsPage.feat4Desc: When someone searches 'restaurant near me', you show up first. Local SEO optimized to fill your tables with organic traffic.
RestaurantsPage.faq1Q: Can I update the menu myself?
RestaurantsPage.faq1A: Yes. We give you access to a panel where you can change dishes, prices, and photos in minutes, no technical skills needed.
RestaurantsPage.faq2Q: Does the reservation system connect with WhatsApp?
RestaurantsPage.faq2A: Yes. Each reservation sends an automatic WhatsApp confirmation to the customer and a notification to your team.
RestaurantsPage.faq3Q: Does it work for restaurant chains?
RestaurantsPage.faq3A: Yes. We can create a multi-location site with independent menus and reservations per location.
RestaurantsPage.faq4Q: Can I receive takeout or delivery orders from my site?
RestaurantsPage.faq4A: Yes. We can integrate an online ordering system with options for dine-in, takeout, or delivery, connected directly to your kitchen.
RestaurantsPage.faq5Q: Does the site help me show up on Google Maps?
RestaurantsPage.faq5A: Yes. We optimize your site with local SEO and connect it to your Google Business profile so you appear when someone searches 'restaurant near me'.
RestaurantsPage.faq6Q: Can I showcase professional photos of my dishes?
RestaurantsPage.faq6A: Yes. Your digital menu includes a high-quality photo gallery for each dish. Food photos are what convince new customers the most.
RestaurantsPage.ctaDesc: We reply in under 2 minutes. No strings attached.

ToursPage.metaTitle: Websites for Tours & Tourism — Bookings & Automation | AION
ToursPage.metaDesc: Tour company websites with online booking system, digital itineraries, and automated traveler follow-up.
ToursPage.title: More bookings, happier travelers
ToursPage.subtitle: Your tour company needs a site that inspires, showcases your experiences, and converts visitors into confirmed bookings.
ToursPage.feat1Desc: Inspiring photos, detailed itineraries, and real-time availability. Travelers see, get excited, and book without talking to you.
ToursPage.feat2Desc: Bookings and payments 24/7 from any timezone. A traveler in Europe books your tour at 3am. You wake up with money in your account.
ToursPage.feat3Desc: Automatic post-trip WhatsApp asks for Google and TripAdvisor reviews. More reviews = more trust = more future bookings.
ToursPage.feat4Desc: SEO optimized for 'tours in [your city]' in English and Spanish. Attract international tourists searching for experiences like yours.
ToursPage.faq1Q: Does the booking system handle multiple languages?
ToursPage.faq1A: Yes. Our sites are bilingual (English/Spanish) by default, ideal for attracting international tourism.
ToursPage.faq2A: Yes. You have a dashboard where you can adjust dates, capacity, and prices for each tour in real time.
ToursPage.faq3Q: Does it include TripAdvisor or Google Reviews integration?
ToursPage.faq3A: Yes. We display your TripAdvisor and Google reviews directly on your site to build trust.
ToursPage.faq4Q: Can I accept online payments from my site?
ToursPage.faq4A: Yes. We integrate payment gateways like Stripe or PayPal so travelers can book and pay directly from your website securely.
ToursPage.faq5Q: Does it work for private and group tours?
ToursPage.faq5A: Yes. The system handles both private and group tours with different prices, schedules, and configurable maximum capacity per tour.
ToursPage.faq6Q: Do customers receive automatic booking confirmation?
ToursPage.faq6A: Yes. Upon booking, the traveler receives confirmation via email and WhatsApp with all tour details: date, time, meeting point, and instructions.
ToursPage.ctaDesc: We reply in under 2 minutes. No strings attached.

GymPage.subtitle: Your gym needs a digital presence that attracts new members and keeps current ones engaged.
GymPage.feat1Desc: New members sign up and pay from your site. No paperwork, no lines. Your front desk is free to assist, not to collect payments.

GymPage.faq2Q: Can I sell memberships and packages online?

GymPage.faq5Q: Can I display each class schedule?
GymPage.faq5A: Yes. Your site has an interactive calendar where members see all available classes by day, time, and instructor.
GymPage.faq6Q: How long does it take to be ready?
GymPage.faq6A: Between 2 and 4 weeks depending on scope. Includes design, development, content, and automation setup.

HowItWorks.sectionDesc: A proven methodology designed to deliver measurable results at every stage.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: We analyze your current operations, identify bottlenecks, and map out a high-impact automation roadmap tailored to your business.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Our team engineers and deploys custom automation systems, seamlessly integrating with your existing tools and processes.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Systems go live with real-time monitoring. We fine-tune performance, ensuring maximum efficiency from day one.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: As your business grows, we expand and evolve your automation infrastructure to match new demands and opportunities.

Testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: Trusted by Growing Businesses
Testimonials.quote1: In 3 weeks we increased appointments by 65%. The WhatsApp system books patients on its own, even at 2 AM. No going back.
Testimonials.quote2: The new site converts 3x more than the old one. And the WhatsApp bot books property tours without anyone watching the phone. Incredible.
Testimonials.quote3: We went from losing 40% of leads to capturing 90%. AION integrated everything: website, CRM, and automated flows. Highly recommend.
Testimonials.quote4: Our site generates 120+ bookings per month automatically. Before, we relied on phone calls. Impeccable work, delivered on time.
Testimonials.quote5: We stopped responding manually and closed 45% more sales. The system works for us 24/7, even on weekends.
Testimonials.quote6: In the first month we tripled our qualified leads. The AI strategy they built was a complete game-changer for our business.
Testimonials.quote7: We went from managing everything by hand to a system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures leads on its own. We save 20+ hours a week.
Testimonials.quote8: We launched the site in record time and had 35 new inquiries in the first week. Post-launch support has been excellent.

WebServicePage.metaTitle: Professional Websites — Web Design Packages | AION
WebServicePage.metaDesc: Professional websites that turn visitors into clients. From $497 USD. Responsive design, SEO, and fast delivery.
WebServicePage.title: Websites that turn visitors into clients
WebServicePage.subtitle: Professional design, optimized for SEO and mobile devices. Your site ready in weeks, not months.
WebServicePage.starterDesc: Landing page optimized to convert. Perfect to get started.
WebServicePage.starterFeat2: Responsive design — perfect on mobile and desktop
WebServicePage.starterFeat4: Basic SEO — show up on Google
WebServicePage.growthDesc: Complete website up to 5 pages. Everything you need to grow.
WebServicePage.growthFeat5: Hosting, SSL & domain included for 1 year
WebServicePage.enterpriseDesc: Custom website up to 15 pages. For businesses that need a complete digital presence.
WebServicePage.note: No long-term contracts. Includes technical support and training.
WebServicePage.faq1Q: How long until my website is ready?
WebServicePage.faq1A: Starter: 1 week. Growth: 2 weeks. Enterprise: 3-4 weeks.
WebServicePage.faq2Q: Can I update the content myself?
WebServicePage.faq2A: Enterprise includes a content management panel. For Starter and Growth, we handle minor updates at no extra cost.
WebServicePage.faq3Q: Does it include hosting and domain?
WebServicePage.faq3A: Yes. Growth and Enterprise include hosting, SSL, and domain for 1 year. Starter includes hosting and SSL.
WebServicePage.faq4Q: What happens after the first year?
WebServicePage.faq4A: You only pay monthly hosting (from $19 USD/mo). No surprises.
WebServicePage.ctaDesc: Book a 15-minute call. We'll advise you with no commitment.

AutomationsServicePage.metaDesc: Automate your business with AI: WhatsApp, CRM, lead follow-up, and workflows. From $997 USD.
AutomationsServicePage.title: Automate your business. Never lose a client again.
AutomationsServicePage.subtitle: AI WhatsApp agents, smart CRM, and automatic prospect follow-up. Your digital sales team working 24/7.
AutomationsServicePage.starterDesc: Basic follow-up automation. Ideal to start capturing every lead.
AutomationsServicePage.growthDesc: Complete AI automation system. For businesses that need serious follow-up.
AutomationsServicePage.growthFeat3: CRM that organizes and scores leads automatically
AutomationsServicePage.enterpriseDesc: Enterprise-scale automation. Custom workflows for complex operations.
AutomationsServicePage.enterpriseFeat6: Support SLA with guaranteed response time
AutomationsServicePage.note: No long-term contracts. Includes setup, training, and support.
AutomationsServicePage.faq1Q: Do I need a website to use automations?
AutomationsServicePage.faq1A: Not necessarily. We can integrate automations with your current site or any lead source.
AutomationsServicePage.faq2A: Starter: 1-2 weeks. Growth: 3-4 weeks. Enterprise: 4-8 weeks depending on complexity.
AutomationsServicePage.faq3Q: What tools does it integrate with?
AutomationsServicePage.faq3A: WhatsApp Business, Google Sheets, Calendly, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Zapier, Make, and more. Enterprise: any tool.
AutomationsServicePage.faq4A: We actively monitor workflows. Growth and Enterprise include priority support and maintenance.
AutomationsServicePage.ctaDesc: We'll show you how to automate your sales process in 20 minutes.

MarketingServicePage.subtitle: Multi-channel campaigns, smart segmentation, and automatic optimization. More qualified leads, less manual effort.

MarketingServicePage.note: Prices do not include ad spend. No long-term contracts.
MarketingServicePage.faq1A: No. Our prices cover management and optimization. Ad spend is paid directly to platforms (Google, Meta, etc.).
MarketingServicePage.faq2Q: How much ad spend do I need?
MarketingServicePage.faq2A: We recommend at least $500 USD/mo for Starter, $1,500 for Growth, and $3,000+ for Enterprise.
MarketingServicePage.faq3Q: How soon will I see results?
MarketingServicePage.faq3A: First campaigns generate data in 1-2 weeks. Optimized results are visible from the second month.
MarketingServicePage.faq4Q: Can I pause or cancel anytime?
MarketingServicePage.faq4A: Yes. No long-term contracts. We just ask for 15 days notice.

HomeFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
HomeFaq.faq1A: We're a digital agency offering three services: professional website design, AI automation (WhatsApp, CRM, lead follow-up), and AI-powered digital marketing. Everything designed so your business gets more clients without more manual effort.
HomeFaq.faq2Q: How long does a typical project take?
HomeFaq.faq2A: It depends on the service. A Starter website is delivered in 1 week. More complex sites take 2-4 weeks. Automations take 1-8 weeks depending on the package. We give you a clear timeline from the first call.
HomeFaq.faq3Q: Do you work with clients outside of Mexico?
HomeFaq.faq3A: Yes. We serve clients across Latin America, the United States, Spain, and anywhere in the world. Our entire process is remote and our sites are bilingual by default.
HomeFaq.faq4Q: Can I hire just one service or do I need all three?
HomeFaq.faq4A: You can hire only what you need. Many clients start with a website and add automations later. There's no obligation to buy combined packages.
HomeFaq.faq5Q: Do you offer a free consultation?
HomeFaq.faq5A: Yes. We offer a free 20-minute strategy call with no commitment. We'll advise you on which services you need and give you a clear plan.
HomeFaq.faq6Q: What happens after my project is delivered?
HomeFaq.faq6A: We don't leave you on your own. All packages include technical support and training. Growth and Enterprise plans offer priority support and ongoing optimization.
HomeFaq.faq7Q: Do I need technical skills to use what you deliver?
HomeFaq.faq7A: No. Everything we deliver comes with included training and intuitive admin panels. If you can use WhatsApp, you can manage your website and automations.
HomeFaq.faq8Q: What makes AION different from other digital agencies?
HomeFaq.faq8A: We combine web design, AI automation, and marketing in a single team. You don't need to hire three separate agencies. Plus, we use artificial intelligence to optimize every process and deliver faster results.
HomeFaq.faq9Q: Is my data and my clients' data secure?
HomeFaq.faq9A: Yes. We use SSL-certified hosting, secure servers, and follow best practices for data protection. Your information and your clients' data is always protected.
HomeFaq.faq10Q: Can I see examples of previous projects?
HomeFaq.faq10A: Yes. You can view our portfolio with real projects including websites, automations, and marketing campaigns we've built for clients across different industries.
